title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Senior Resident and Senior Demonstrator Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Mangalagiri has declared the latest job notification for 21 Senior Resident and Senior Demonstrator Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MD/ MS, DNB, Ph.D, Post Graduation, M.Sc can use this opportunity and apply for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a ...
